title: Wayland layer-shell surface
notes: Implemented wayland.rs with BarState struct implementing CompositorHandler, LayerShellHandler, OutputHandler, SeatHandler via sctk 0.19. Layer anchored TOP|LEFT|RIGHT, exclusive_zone=32, height=32, KeyboardInteractivity::None. blocking_dispatch event loop. main.rs updated with tokio::main and tracing init. Requires bare-metal Wayland to run.

title: wgpu rendering pipeline
notes: Implemented renderer.rs with Renderer struct. Surface created via SurfaceTargetUnsafe::RawHandle using Wayland display/surface raw pointers (wayland-client system feature for ObjectId::as_ptr). WGSL rect pipeline with bytemuck ColorVertex (Float32x2 pos + Float32x4 color). glyphon TextRenderer/TextAtlas/SwashCache for text at 13px monospace. render() accepts &[ModuleOutput]. render_layout() takes &BarLayout. draw_spark_rects() for sparkline overlay pass. Added bytemuck, raw-window-handle, anyhow to Cargo.toml and wayland-client system feature.

title: System metrics reader
notes: Implemented metrics.rs with SystemMetrics (cpu_usage_pct, cpu_temp_c, mem_used_mb, mem_total_mb, net_rx_kbps, net_tx_kbps, gpu_temp_c, gpu_usage_pct). poll() is synchronous std-only. CPU usage: /proc/stat delta via static Mutex<Option<CpuTimes>>. CPU temp: /sys/class/thermal/thermal_zone* scanning for x86_pkg_temp or cpu. Memory: /proc/meminfo MemTotal+MemAvailable. Network+GPU implemented directly (see task 7).

title: Left/center/right module layout
notes: Implemented layout.rs with Zone enum, ModuleOutput (zone, text, color, bg_color, x, width), BarLayout (left/center/right vecs, bar_width, bar_height=32). compute_positions() positions left at x=8+, center around bar_width/2, right-aligned at bar_width-8. 1px COLD-colored separator between center and right. render_layout() added to Renderer. pub mod layout in main.rs.

title: D-Bus client for thermal-conductor
notes: Implemented dbus.rs with #[zbus::proxy] ConductorProxy for org.thermal.Conductor interface. ConductorClient::new() connects to session bus, stores None on error. get_all_states() reads panes property, calls get_agent_state per pane, parses string to AgentState (idle/running/thinking/warning/error/complete). Resilient: returns empty vec on any failure. pub mod dbus in main.rs.

title: Clock + date module
notes: Implemented modules/clock.rs with ClockModule. Uses std::process::Command to call date +%H:%M:%S and date +%Y-%m-%d. Caches in static Mutex<Option<ClockCache>> refreshed every 500ms via Instant::elapsed. Returns two ModuleOutput: time in WARM green, date in TEXT_MUTED. modules/mod.rs declares clock and metrics_module. pub mod modules in main.rs.

title: Network and GPU metrics
notes: Implemented as part of task 3 in metrics.rs. net_rx_kbps/net_tx_kbps: /proc/net/dev with per-interface byte summing (skip lo), delta via static Mutex<Option<NetSample>>, elapsed via /proc/uptime. AMD GPU temp: /sys/class/drm/card0/device/hwmon/*/temp1_input and /sys/class/hwmon/hwmon*/name==amdgpu path. AMD GPU usage: /sys/class/drm/card0/device/gpu_busy_percent. NVIDIA fallback: nvidia-smi subprocess parsing two comma-separated values. MetricsModule in modules/metrics_module.rs renders all fields with thermal gradient color coding.

title: Thermal gradient sparklines
notes: Implemented sparkline.rs with Sparkline (VecDeque history, capacity, push, render_rects). render_rects() produces SparkRect vec with thermal_gradient_f32(value) colors, bottom-aligned 20px bar chart, bar_width=total_width/capacity. SparklineSet manages cpu_usage, cpu_temp (normalized 20-100C to 0-1), mem_used (normalized by mem_total) with 30-sample capacity. push_metrics() takes &SystemMetrics. render_all() positions 3x 60px sparklines with 8px gaps. draw_spark_rects() added to Renderer as a LoadOp::Load overlay pass. pub mod sparkline in main.rs.
